compiled_state.title: Wire CI workflow to enable RED-zone tolerance
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: In .github/workflows/ci.yml, set SUITE_TEST_INDEX env var to repo .test-index path for Hook Tests and Script Tests jobs. No runner script changes needed. Acceptance: CI passes when only RED-zone failures exist.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CI workflow sets SUITE_TEST_INDEX env var for Hook Tests job
  Verify: grep -q 'SUITE_TEST_INDEX' .github/workflows/ci.yml
- [ ] CI workflow sets SUITE_TEST_INDEX env var for Script Tests job
  Verify: grep -q 'SUITE_TEST_INDEX' .github/workflows/ci.yml
- [ ] SUITE_TEST_INDEX points to the repo .test-index path
- [ ] No runner script changes needed — env var only
- [ ] CI passes when only RED-zone failures exist (validated by existing tolerance tests)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — Hook Tests job at line 69 (test-hooks), Script Tests job at line 83 (test-scripts). Both run test scripts directly with no env vars currently set.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — env var config change) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Added SUITE_TEST_INDEX env var at job level to both test-hooks and test-scripts jobs, pointing to ${{ github.workspace }}/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
CHECKPOINT 5/6: Verification complete ✓
- AC1 PASS: SUITE_TEST_INDEX present for Hook Tests job
- AC2 PASS: SUITE_TEST_INDEX present for Script Tests job
- AC3 PASS: Points to ${{ github.workspace }}/.test-index (repo .test-index path)
- AC4 PASS: No runner script changes — env var only (diff confirms only ci.yml modified)
- AC5: CI will pass when only RED-zone failures exist (validated by existing tolerance tests)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: SUITE_TEST_INDEX env var added to CI Hook Tests and Script Tests jobs
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
